$comment: generated by the ocm schema generation tool
title: Config
description: Config represents the HTTP client configuration.

timeout.description:
Timeout specifies the HTTP client timeout as a Go duration string
(e.g. "30s", "5m", "1h"). If not set, the default timeout of 30s is used.

ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.$comment: generated by the ocm schema generation tool
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.title: Timeout
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.description:
Timeout wraps time.Duration to support JSON/YAML marshaling
of human-readable duration strings (e.g. "30s", "5m", "1h").
